description_long: This is a modern, boxy two-story house with a flat roof, featuring a rooftop glass atrium or greenhouse. The front facade has large rectangular windows and a covered carport with two red cars parked underneath. The house is surrounded by a wooden deck and a pink picket fence, with a landscaped backyard that includes a small pool, patio furniture, and mature trees. The rear and side elevations showcase floor-to-ceiling windows, providing ample natural light and views of the outdoor living spaces. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor areas.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a carport, and a landscaped backyard with a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, carport with two red cars, and rooftop glass atrium.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extensive floor-to-ceiling windows, pink picket fence, and backyard patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a pool, patio furniture, and mature trees, as well as the open deck area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pink fence, carport, and the transition from the house to the backyard landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small set of steps, minimalistic door, and covered porch integrated into the carport structure.
